red_team.construction_sound: w.v_hat ~1e-14 (exact orthogonality) -> w.Zp==w.Z -> Y* session-invariant to machine precision -> genuinely NO_CONCEPT; delta=0 gives Zp==Z bit-identical (==NULL_cov), auc~0.52 anchor matches real soft covariate.
red_team.oracle_null_decisive: Regenerating Y* from the TRUE boundary through the identical cross-fit puts observed T in the bulk of the true null (oracle_p~Uniform, oracle_Tz +/-2), while the certifier's fixed-margin swap-null is mis-centered ~7-10x too low and 2-3x under-dispersed -> pins fixed_margin_p at floor, T_z 10-28. The STATISTIC (cross-fit observed_T) is NOT indicted; the fixed-margin NULL is.
red_team.genuine_false_confirm: valid=True, n_invalid=0 for all 600 (confident false-confirms, not abstentions); confirms also defeat the subject-consistency gate (systematic covariate -> systematic per-subject interaction overfit).
red_team.mechanism: the shift lands 100% in the certifier's rank-3 PC interaction basis (sessmean_in_top3PC=1.000); a strong marginal covariate inflates the finite-sample cross-fit interaction-overfit T (artifact-T up to ~0.0085) into the genuine-concept range (POS median ~0.0097); the observed_T>=tau gate that filtered the soft artifact (T<0.006) provably cannot filter it.
red_team.scope: demonstrated for a covariate along the leading PC orthogonal to w (lands in the top-3 PC interaction subspace = the generic strong-marginal-shift case); a strong covariate OUTSIDE the top-3 PCs is UNTESTED. One held-out block per strength; 3-point dose-response (thin but unambiguous, T_z 10-28 dwarfs block noise).
